name: contextflow
description: A Context Hierarchy Manager skill for long-running technical conversations.

commands.name: /context
commands.description: Render the current ContextFlow tree, breadcrumb, quick actions, and suggested commands.

commands.name: /done
commands.description: Mark the active node as done, move focus to the parent branch, and print the refreshed tree.

commands.name: /merge
commands.description: Merge the current detour back into its parent branch.

commands.name: /move_to
commands.description: Move the current node to a different parent branch.
